name: Circuit Loops
short_description: Fulfill your dream to create electronic music. Circuit Loops is the best option for you! A powerful EDM sequencer that will let you create any genre of electronic music you like using built-in samples and loops. Compose your track today and become the uprising star of the EDM scene!
detailed_description:
Fulfill your dream to create electronic music. Circuit Loops is the best option for you! A powerful EDM sequencer that will let you create any genre of electronic music you like using built-in samples and loops. Compose your track today and become the uprising star of the EDM scene!

Create Your Track

  • 10 pre-recorded beats;
  • 10 applicable instruments.
  • Built-in effects and recorder

Circuit Loops is an easy start for your music producing career

Circuit Loops is an easy start for your music producing career
supported_languages: English, German, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian
